text.title: Cognitive Walkthrough Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying cognitive-walkthrough; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: One evaluator runs the walkthrough; misses 40-60% of issues a second evaluator would find.
Evaluator answers 'yes' to Q2 because they know where the action is; novice users would not.
antipattern.root-cause: Expert knowledge leaks into the first-time frame.
antipattern.fix: Explicit bracketing: 'pretend you have never used this app'; pair with a novice observer.

antipattern.symptom: Findings list lacks severity; stakeholders cannot prioritise remediation.
antipattern.fix: Every finding tagged catastrophic / major / minor / cosmetic before delivery.
